name: Enformer
description: Convolution/transformer model for predicting gene expression and regulatory tracks from long DNA context.
io: DNA sequence window -> tissue/cell-type regulatory predictions
use_cases: Variant effect prediction, enhancer/promoter analysis, expression impact

name: DNABERT
description: BERT-style k-mer DNA language model trained on the human genome.
io: DNA k-mer sequence -> embeddings or task logits
use_cases: Promoter/enhancer/TFBS classification, sequence embeddings

name: DNABERT-2
description: More efficient multi-species genome transformer with BPE tokenization and GUE benchmark.
io: DNA sequence up to about 2 kb -> embeddings/log-likelihood/task heads
use_cases: Regulatory element classification, variant scoring, similarity

name: Nucleotide Transformer
description: Family of DNA foundation models, 50M to 2.5B parameters, trained on human and multi-species genomes.
io: DNA sequence -> nucleotide/sequence embeddings, fine-tuned predictions
use_cases: Regulatory genomics, splice/variant effect prediction, transfer learning

name: HyenaDNA
description: Long-context genomic model using Hyena operators, single-nucleotide resolution up to about 1M tokens.
io: Long DNA sequence -> embeddings or task logits
use_cases: Long-range genomics, regulatory classification, synthetic long-context benchmarks

name: Caduceus
description: Bidirectional long-range DNA language model with reverse-complement equivariance, based on Mamba-style blocks.
io: DNA sequence -> embeddings/log-likelihood/task outputs
use_cases: Variant effect, long-range regulatory modeling, RC-aware genomics

name: GENA-LM
description: Open-source long-sequence DNA language model family.
io: DNA sequence -> embeddings/fine-tuned predictions
use_cases: Long DNA classification, regulatory genomics, model benchmarking

name: GPN-MSA
description: Alignment-based DNA language model for genome-wide variant effect prediction.
io: MSA/genomic context -> variant effect score
use_cases: Genome-wide variant scoring, evolutionary constraint

name: Evo
description: 7B long-context biological sequence model trained on prokaryotic and phage genomes; spans DNA/RNA/protein coding signals.
io: Nucleotide byte sequence -> next-token probabilities, generated sequence, embeddings
use_cases: Genome-scale generation, CRISPR/Cas system design, molecular function prediction

name: Evo 2
description: Genome model trained across all domains of life with long context and single-nucleotide resolution.
io: DNA sequence up to large genomic context -> likelihoods, variants, generated genomes
use_cases: Coding/noncoding variant effects, genome design, cross-domain genomics

name: LucaOne
description: Unified nucleic-acid and protein biological foundation model.
io: DNA/RNA/protein sequence -> embeddings and downstream task predictions
use_cases: Cross-modality sequence embeddings, central-dogma tasks, functional prediction

name: BioSeq-BLM
description: Platform for applying biological language models to DNA, RNA, and protein sequences.
io: Biological sequence -> features/predictors/evaluation outputs
use_cases: Building sequence predictors without hand-engineered features

name: RNA-FM
description: RNA foundation model trained on millions of ncRNA sequences; extracts structure/function-aware RNA embeddings.
io: RNA sequence -> residue/sequence embeddings, task heads
use_cases: RNA secondary structure, function prediction, ncRNA annotation

name: mRNA-FM / PlantRNA-FM
description: RNA-FM-derived models specialized for coding mRNA or plant RNA.
io: RNA sequence +/- structure tokens -> embeddings/task outputs
use_cases: Translation dynamics, plant RNA function, mRNA feature prediction

name: RiNALMo
description: 650M-parameter RNA language model trained on noncoding RNA sequences.
io: RNA sequence -> embeddings/secondary-structure features
use_cases: RNA structure prediction, functional annotation, transfer learning

name: UNI-RNA
description: Universal RNA pretraining model for structure and function tasks.
status: Inference code public; weights via Google Drive, CC BY-NC (non-commercial)
io: RNA sequence -> embeddings/task predictions
use_cases: RNA structure/function prediction, RNA sequence representation

name: ERNIE-RNA
description: Structure-enhanced RNA language model incorporating base-pairing restrictions.
io: RNA sequence/structure-aware tokens -> embeddings, attention, structure outputs
use_cases: Secondary structure, RNA functional annotation

name: RNABERT
description: Early BERT-style RNA sequence model for structural alignment and clustering.
io: RNA sequence -> base embeddings
use_cases: RNA clustering, structural alignment, representation learning

name: SpliceBERT
description: Pre-mRNA sequence model for splicing-related prediction.
io: Pre-mRNA sequence -> embeddings/splicing predictions
use_cases: Splice site and splicing regulatory variant analysis

name: RNA-MSM
description: MSA-based RNA language modeling for structure inference.
io: RNA MSA -> embeddings/structure-related predictions
use_cases: Homology-aware RNA structure inference

name: GenerRNA
description: Generative pretrained model for de novo RNA design.
io: Prompt/seed RNA context -> generated RNA sequences
use_cases: RNA design, synthetic sequence exploration

name: AIDO.RNA
description: Large RNA function/structure foundation model in the AIDO/GenBio ecosystem.
io: RNA sequence -> embeddings, structure/function task heads
use_cases: RNA function, structure prediction, downstream adaptation

name: ESM-1b / ESM-1v
description: Evolutionary-scale protein masked language models; ESM-1v is widely used for zero-shot variant effect prediction.
io: Amino acid sequence -> residue embeddings, log-likelihoods
use_cases: Protein embeddings, mutation effect scoring, function/structure transfer

name: ESM-2
description: Larger ESM protein LM family; basis for ESMFold and many embeddings workflows.
io: Protein sequence -> embeddings, contacts, structure via ESMFold
use_cases: Structure prediction, embeddings, zero-shot scoring

name: ESMFold
description: Fast protein structure prediction from a single sequence using ESM-2 representations.
io: Protein sequence -> 3D protein structure
use_cases: MSA-free structure prediction, metagenomic structure annotation

name: ESM3
description: Multimodal generative protein model over sequence, structure, and function tracks.
status: Open smaller models + API/gated larger models
io: Sequence/structure/function prompts -> completed/generated protein
use_cases: Controllable protein generation, function-guided design

name: ESM-C / ESM Cambrian
description: Protein sequence encoder family optimized for representation learning.
io: Protein sequence -> embeddings/logits
use_cases: Protein search, annotation, downstream feature extraction

name: ProtTrans / ProtT5 / ProtBERT
description: Large transformer protein language models trained on UniProt/BFD-scale protein corpora.
io: Protein sequence -> embeddings/task predictions
use_cases: General protein embeddings, fine-tuning, annotation

name: ProteinBERT
description: Universal protein sequence/function model combining local and global tokens.
io: Protein sequence +/- annotations -> embeddings/task outputs
use_cases: Function prediction, protein classification

name: ProGen / ProGen2
description: Autoregressive protein language models for sequence generation and fitness scoring.
io: Prompt/control tokens + sequence context -> generated protein sequence
use_cases: De novo protein generation, family-conditioned design, zero-shot fitness

name: ProGen3
description: Scaled sparse autoregressive protein LM for generation and protein understanding.
io: Protein prompt/context -> generated sequence/log-likelihood
use_cases: Large-scale protein generation and scoring

name: Ankh
description: Efficient general-purpose protein language model.
io: Protein sequence -> embeddings/task heads
use_cases: Lightweight transfer learning, protein classification

name: ProtGPT2
description: GPT-style protein generator.
io: Prompt/seed sequence -> generated protein sequence
use_cases: De novo sequence generation, novelty exploration

name: xTrimoPGLM
description: Very large protein language model family from BioMap.
io: Protein sequence -> embeddings/generation
use_cases: Protein understanding, large-scale protein representation

name: IgLM
description: Autoregressive antibody language model.
io: Antibody chain context -> generated antibody sequence
use_cases: Antibody design, repertoire modeling

name: AntiBERTa
description: Antibody-specific BERT-style representation model.
io: Antibody sequence -> embeddings
use_cases: Antibody clustering, developability, paratope-related tasks

name: AbLang
description: Antibody language model for completing and restoring antibody sequences.
io: Antibody sequence with masks/gaps -> completed sequence/embeddings
use_cases: Antibody sequence completion, repertoire cleanup

name: EVE
description: VAE over protein family MSAs for disease variant prediction.
io: Protein MSA -> variant effect score
use_cases: Human disease variant interpretation, protein family fitness

name: MSA Transformer
description: Transformer over multiple sequence alignments.
io: MSA -> embeddings, contacts, mutation scores
use_cases: Contact prediction, variant scoring with homologs

name: Tranception
description: Autoregressive protein model with inference-time retrieval over homologs.
io: Protein sequence + optional MSA/retrieval -> fitness score/generated sequence
use_cases: Protein fitness prediction, variant prioritization

name: PoET
description: Generative model of protein families as sequence sets.
io: Family sequence set -> generated/scored sequences
use_cases: Family-specific protein design, few-shot fitness

name: ProteinMPNN
description: Neural inverse folding model for designing sequences for a given backbone.
io: Protein backbone/PDB -> designed FASTA sequences
use_cases: Stabilizing backbones, binder scaffolds, redesign

name: ESM-IF1
description: Inverse folding model trained from large predicted structure sets.
io: Backbone coordinates -> sequence likelihood/design
use_cases: Inverse folding, structure-conditioned mutation scoring

name: RFdiffusion
description: Diffusion model for protein backbone and functional-motif design; RFdiffusion3 (2025) extends it to an all-atom diffusion model that designs proteins in the context of ligands, nucleic acids, and arbitrary non-protein atoms (e.g. enzymes, DNA-binding proteins).
io: Motif/target constraints -> protein backbone design
use_cases: Binder design, enzyme scaffolding, symmetric assemblies

name: Chroma
description: Programmable generative protein model.
io: Constraints/prompts -> protein backbone/sequence designs
use_cases: Controllable protein generation

name: DPLM
description: Diffusion language model for protein sequence learning and generation.
io: Protein sequence masks/noise -> denoised/generated sequence
use_cases: Sequence generation, protein representation learning

name: BioEmu-1
description: Generative emulator of protein equilibrium ensembles.
io: Protein sequence -> conformational ensemble samples
use_cases: Protein dynamics, conformational heterogeneity

name: AlphaFold 3
description: Diffusion-based model for structures of proteins, nucleic acids, ligands, ions, and modifications.
io: Protein/DNA/RNA/ligand specification -> complex 3D structure
use_cases: Biomolecular interaction modeling, drug discovery, complex hypotheses

name: Chai-1
description: Multimodal structure model for proteins, small molecules, DNA, RNA, glycosylations, and more.
io: FASTA/SMILES/CCD-like inputs -> complex 3D structure
use_cases: Open AlphaFold3-like complex prediction, ligand/protein/nucleic-acid modeling

name: Boltz-1 / Boltz-2
description: Open biomolecular interaction model family; Boltz-2 adds affinity modeling.
io: Biomolecular complex specification -> structure +/- affinity
use_cases: Complex prediction, virtual screening, affinity-aware molecular design

name: RoseTTAFold All-Atom
description: All-atom model for biomolecular assemblies with proteins, nucleic acids, small molecules, metals, and modifications; succeeded by RoseTTAFold3 / RF3 (2025) with improved chirality handling and flexible atomic-distance conditioning for docking.
io: Protein/nucleic acid/ligand assembly inputs -> all-atom structure
use_cases: General biomolecular assembly modeling

name: OpenFold
description: Open reimplementation/training framework for AlphaFold2-style protein structure prediction.
io: Protein sequence/MSA/templates -> 3D protein structure
use_cases: Open AF2 reproduction, training, structure prediction

name: DiffDock
description: Diffusion model for protein-ligand docking.
io: Protein structure + ligand -> ligand pose(s)
use_cases: Docking, pose generation, blind docking workflows

name: ChemBERTa / ChemBERTa-2
description: BERT/RoBERTa-style chemical language models over SMILES.
io: SMILES -> embeddings/masked-token predictions/task heads
use_cases: Molecular property prediction, QSAR, transfer learning

name: ChemBERTa-3
description: Open training framework and benchmark suite for chemical foundation models.
io: SMILES -> embeddings/task heads
use_cases: Re-training and benchmarking chemical encoders

name: MoLFormer
description: Large-scale chemical language model over SMILES with linear attention.
io: SMILES -> molecular embeddings
use_cases: Molecular property prediction, similarity, screening

name: GP-MoLFormer
description: Autoregressive MoLFormer-style generator trained on large SMILES corpora.
io: SMILES prompt/context -> generated SMILES
use_cases: De novo molecular generation, analog generation

name: GROVER
description: Self-supervised graph transformer for molecular representation learning.
io: Molecular graph/SMILES-derived graph -> embeddings/task heads
use_cases: Property prediction, graph-based QSAR

name: GraphMVP
description: Multi-view pretraining linking 2D molecular graphs and 3D geometry.
io: 2D graph + 3D conformer -> embeddings
use_cases: Property prediction, 3D-aware molecular representation

name: Uni-Mol
description: Universal 3D molecular representation framework with molecular and pocket pretraining; Uni-Mol3 (2025) extends the series to multi-molecule chemical reactions via a 3D-aware Mol-Tokenizer and two-stage pretraining.
io: 3D conformers/pockets -> embeddings, docking/property outputs
use_cases: Molecular property, protein-ligand binding, docking, virtual screening

name: MegaMolBART
description: BART-style generative model for SMILES in NVIDIA BioNeMo.
io: SMILES -> latent embeddings or generated SMILES
use_cases: Molecular generation, analog search, property optimization

name: MolMIM
description: Mutual-information-based molecular generator used in BioNeMo workflows.
io: Molecular seed/objective -> optimized generated molecules
use_cases: Goal-directed generation, molecular optimization

name: MolT5
description: Molecule-language sequence-to-sequence model for molecule captioning and text-to-molecule generation.
io: SMILES <-> natural-language description
use_cases: Molecule captioning, text-guided molecule generation

name: 3D-MolT5
description: Multimodal molecule-text model integrating SMILES, 3D structural tokens, and text.
io: SMILES/3D/text -> generated text or molecule
use_cases: 3D-aware molecule-text tasks, molecular design with descriptions

name: MolE
description: Recursion chemistry foundation model combining geometric deep learning and transformers.
io: Molecule structure -> embeddings/property predictions
use_cases: Low-data property prediction, drug discovery representation learning

name: Geneformer
description: Transformer pretrained on large human single-cell transcriptome corpora for network biology.
io: Ranked/selected expressed genes per cell -> cell/gene embeddings, predictions
use_cases: In silico perturbation, dosage sensitivity, target discovery, classification

name: GeneformerV2
description: Scaled and quantized Geneformer family for resource-efficient network biology.
io: scRNA cell profile -> embeddings/perturbation outputs
use_cases: Efficient Geneformer workflows, larger corpora, network predictions

name: scGPT
description: Generative pre-trained transformer for single-cell and multi-omics analysis.
io: AnnData/count matrix -> embeddings, reconstructed genes, task predictions
use_cases: Annotation, integration, perturbation prediction, gene network inference

name: scFoundation
description: Large single-cell transcriptomics model trained on more than 50M cells.
io: Gene expression vector -> embeddings/reconstruction/task heads
use_cases: Cell annotation, drug response, gene module inference

name: UCE
description: Universal Cell Embeddings model trained across human and multiple species.
io: AnnData expression profile -> universal cell embedding
use_cases: Cross-species/cross-tissue cell search, annotation, atlas alignment

name: SATURN
description: Cross-species cell embedding model using protein-language-model gene features.
io: scRNA counts + protein embeddings + labels -> shared cell embedding
use_cases: Cross-species integration, homologous cell type mapping

name: CellPLM
description: Cell language model that encodes cell-cell relationships beyond isolated cells.
io: Tissue/cell collection expression data -> cell embeddings/task outputs
use_cases: Annotation, spatial-informed tasks, fast embedding

name: xTrimoGene
description: Efficient scalable representation learner for scRNA-seq.
io: Sparse scRNA vector -> embeddings/task predictions
use_cases: Annotation, perturbation response, drug-combination prediction

name: GeneCompass
description: Knowledge-informed cross-species foundation model for gene regulation.
io: scRNA + biological priors -> gene/cell embeddings and GRN predictions
use_cases: Regulatory mechanisms, fate regulator discovery, target discovery

name: scPRINT
description: Large cell model trained on more than 50M cells for gene network inference.
io: scRNA count data -> embeddings, gene networks, denoised outputs
use_cases: Gene regulatory network inference, denoising, label prediction

name: CellFM
description: 800M-parameter foundation model trained on about 100M human cells.
io: Single-cell expression -> embeddings/task predictions
use_cases: Annotation, disease-state analysis, gene function prediction

name: TranscriptFormer
description: Cross-species generative cell atlas trained on up to 112M cells across 12 species.
io: Single-cell transcriptome -> embeddings/generative outputs
use_cases: Cross-species atlas modeling, cell-state representation, virtual-cell workflows

name: AIDO.Cell
description: Transcriptome-scale single-cell foundation model capable of full human transcriptome context.
io: Full transcriptome expression vector -> dense representation/task outputs
use_cases: Target ID, in silico knockout, transcriptome-scale representations

name: SCimilarity
description: Cell atlas foundation model for scalable search of similar human cells.
io: scRNA profile -> embedding / nearest atlas cells
use_cases: Cell-state search, annotation, reference mapping

name: scBERT
description: Early BERT-style scRNA model for cell type annotation.
io: scRNA expression ranks -> cell type prediction
use_cases: Cell annotation, transfer learning baseline

name: scMulan
description: Multitask generative pre-trained model for single-cell analysis.
io: scRNA/multi-task inputs -> annotation/integration/generation outputs
use_cases: Multi-task single-cell analysis

name: scCello
description: Cell-ontology guided transcriptome foundation model.
io: scRNA expression + ontology context -> cell representations/labels
use_cases: Ontology-aware annotation

name: scPROTEIN
description: Graph contrastive model for single-cell proteomics embeddings.
io: Single-cell proteomics data -> embeddings
use_cases: Mass cytometry/CyTOF-style proteomic cell analysis

name: Atacformer
description: Transformer foundation model for ATAC-seq analysis and interpretation.
io: ATAC-seq peaks/accessibility profiles -> embeddings/predictions
use_cases: Chromatin accessibility modeling, regulatory interpretation

name: Cell2Sentence
description: Representation strategy treating cells as sentences for LLM-compatible biology workflows.
io: scRNA profile -> text-like sequence or LLM-compatible representation
use_cases: Cell annotation, LLM-assisted single-cell reasoning

name: ChatCell
description: Natural-language interface for single-cell analysis.
io: User question + single-cell data/context -> analysis narrative/outputs
use_cases: Interactive single-cell analysis, analyst assistance

name: BioT5
description: Text-molecule-protein style sequence-to-sequence model integrating biology, chemistry, and language.
io: Text/SMILES/protein tokens -> generated text/sequence/task output
use_cases: Cross-modal bio/chem text tasks, molecule/protein captioning

name: BioT5+
description: Expanded BioT5 model with IUPAC integration and multi-task tuning.
io: Text + biological/chemical sequence tokens -> generated outputs
use_cases: Generalized bio/chem language tasks

name: ProtST
description: Protein sequence and biomedical text contrastive model.
io: Protein sequence + text descriptions -> aligned embeddings
use_cases: Text-guided protein retrieval/function annotation

name: ProteinDT
description: Text-guided protein design framework.
io: Natural-language prompt -> protein representation/design candidates
use_cases: Text-conditioned protein design

name: ProTrek
description: Tri-modal contrastive learning across protein sequence, structure, and text.
io: Sequence/structure/text -> shared embeddings
use_cases: Protein retrieval, annotation, multimodal search

name: Galactica
description: General scientific LLM sometimes used for scientific/bio text, but withdrawn from original public demo.
io: Scientific text -> generated text
use_cases: Literature/text assistance; not a biology-sequence model

name: CZI Virtual Cells Platform
description: Central access to cell foundation models, datasets, benchmarking, and CLI workflows.
use_cases: Useful for Geneformer, scGPT, UCE, scPRINT, TranscriptFormer, AIDO.Cell model cards and quickstarts.

name: Helical
description: Python framework wrapping genomics, transcriptomics, and single-cell foundation models.
use_cases: Helpful when comparing models with a unified API; commercial offers also exist.

name: NVIDIA BioNeMo
description: Framework, recipes, NIM microservices, and model collection for DNA/RNA/protein/small-molecule workflows.
use_cases: Includes or wraps DNABERT, Geneformer, ESM, MegaMolBART/MolMIM-like workflows, and newer BioNeMo models.

name: AIDO / AIDO.ModelGenerator
description: GenBio AI software stack for adapting multiscale biological foundation models.
use_cases: Covers AIDO DNA/RNA/protein/cell model families and downstream adapters.

name: AlphaFold Server
description: Hosted structure prediction for proteins and biomolecular complexes.
use_cases: Practical entry point for users who do not need local AF3 execution.

name: Hugging Face biology orgs
description: Model-card access to many pretrained models.
use_cases: Always check whether a model card is official or an independently validated mirror.

name: AlphaGenome
description: DeepMind's unified DNA sequence model that takes up to 1 Mb of DNA and predicts thousands of regulatory tracks (gene expression, splicing, chromatin accessibility, histone marks, TF binding, contact maps) at single-base resolution, plus variant-effect scores.
io: DNA sequence up to 1 Mb -> multimodal genomic tracks + variant effect scores at base-pair resolution
use_cases: Regulatory variant effect prediction, splicing/expression impact, enhancer-promoter analysis, in silico mutagenesis

name: Borzoi
description: Calico convolutional model that predicts base-resolution RNA-seq coverage (plus ChIP/DNase/ATAC/CAGE) from ~524 kb of DNA as a unifying model of gene regulation; built on the Enformer architecture.
io: ~524 kb DNA window -> RNA-seq coverage at 32 bp resolution across many assays/tissues; derived variant scores
use_cases: eQTL/sQTL/paQTL/ipaQTL variant scoring, transcription/splicing/polyadenylation modeling, regulatory variant interpretation

name: Sei
description: Deep convolutional model from the Troyanskaya lab predicting 21,907 chromatin profiles (>1,300 cell lines/tissues) and organizing them into 40 interpretable regulatory 'sequence classes' for variant interpretation.
io: DNA sequence (~4 kb context) -> 21,907 chromatin-profile predictions + sequence-class scores; variant effect on regulatory activity
use_cases: Noncoding variant interpretation, regulatory activity classification, disease/trait genetics, sequence-class annotation

name: DeepSEA
description: Pioneering deep-learning sequence model that predicts 919 chromatin features (TF binding, DNase, histone marks) from DNA with single-nucleotide sensitivity to prioritize noncoding variants.
io: DNA sequence (~1 kb) -> 919 chromatin feature predictions; noncoding variant effect scores
use_cases: Noncoding/eQTL/disease variant prioritization, chromatin feature prediction, regulatory sequence analysis

name: ChromBPNet
description: Kundaje-lab bias-factorized, base-resolution CNN of chromatin accessibility (ATAC/DNase) that deconvolves enzyme bias to reveal TF motifs, footprints and regulatory variants.
io: DNA sequence -> base-resolution accessibility profiles; TF motif/footprint and variant-effect outputs
use_cases: cis-regulatory syntax discovery, TF footprinting, regulatory variant scoring, enhancer/accessibility modeling

name: GPN (Genomic Pre-trained Network)
description: Self-supervised convolutional DNA language model that learns gene structure and motifs unsupervised and gives zero-shot genome-wide variant effect scores (original plant/Arabidopsis + Brassicales version).
io: DNA sequence -> per-nucleotide log-likelihoods/embeddings; zero-shot variant effect scores
use_cases: Unsupervised variant effect prediction, evolutionary constraint, motif/gene-structure discovery, plant and other genomes

name: GENERator
description: Long-context generative (decoder/transformer) genomic foundation model with 98 kb context, ~1.2B params, pretrained on 386 Gbp of eukaryotic DNA (RefSeq) with 6-mer tokenization.
io: DNA prompt/context -> generated DNA sequences (coding regions, cis-regulatory elements), embeddings, likelihoods
use_cases: Synthetic enhancer/CRE design, protein-coding sequence generation, long-context genomic representation, variant analysis

name: GenomeOcean
description: Efficient 4-billion-parameter generative genome foundation model trained on 600+ Gbp of contigs from 220 TB of diverse metagenomic co-assemblies, using BPE tokenization.
io: DNA sequence -> embeddings, next-token likelihoods, generated genomic/metagenomic sequences
use_cases: Metagenomic sequence modeling, biosynthetic gene cluster generation, genome representation, sequence generation

name: megaDNA
description: Multiscale hierarchical transformer pretrained on ~100k unannotated bacteriophage genomes with nucleotide-level tokenization; can generate de novo phage genomes up to 96 kb.
io: DNA context -> generated genome-scale sequences (up to 96 kb), zero-shot predictions (essential genes, variant effects, regulatory activity, taxonomy)
use_cases: Whole-phage-genome generation/design, essential-gene and variant-effect prediction, regulatory element and taxonomy prediction

name: DNAGPT
description: Generalized GPT-style DNA model pretrained on 200B+ bp from all mammals, augmented with numerical regression (GC content) and binary-classification (sequence order) objectives and a multi-modal token language.
io: DNA sequence (+numbers) -> embeddings, classifications, regressions, generated sequences
use_cases: Genomic signal/region recognition, mRNA abundance regression, artificial genome generation, multi-task DNA analysis

name: GROVER (DNA language model)
description: BERT-style human-genome language model (Poetsch lab, TU Dresden) trained with byte-pair encoding whose vocabulary is selected via a next-k-mer prediction task to capture genomic 'grammar'. Name = Genome Rules Obtained Via Extracted Representations.
io: DNA sequence -> embeddings/masked-token predictions; fine-tuned task outputs
use_cases: Genome element identification, protein-DNA binding prediction, sequence embeddings, genome-stability analysis

name: Mistral-DNA
description: Family of compact DNA language models adapting the Mistral/Mixtral architecture to genomics, pretrained via causal language modeling on human (hg38) and other genomes.
io: DNA sequence -> embeddings, next-token likelihoods, generated DNA; fine-tuned task heads
use_cases: Genomic sequence classification, DNA generation, fine-tuning for regulatory/variant tasks, teaching/tutorials

name: AgroNT (Agronomic Nucleotide Transformer)
description: 1B-parameter DNA foundation model from InstaDeep trained on 48 edible/crop plant genomes for plant regulatory and trait genomics; a Nucleotide-Transformer sibling.
io: Plant DNA sequence (6-mer tokens, ~6 kb) -> embeddings; fine-tuned regulatory/expression/TFBS/variant predictions
use_cases: Crop regulatory annotation, tissue-specific expression prediction, TF binding site and promoter/terminator strength, trait/crop-protection genomics

name: PlantCaduceus (PlantCAD / PlantCAD2)
description: Caduceus/Mamba-based bidirectional, reverse-complement-equivariant DNA language model pretrained on 16 angiosperm genomes for cross-species plant genomics at single-nucleotide resolution.
io: Plant DNA window (512 bp) -> embeddings/masked-token predictions; zero-shot variant scores, fine-tuned annotations
use_cases: Cross-species splice/TIS/TTS annotation, deleterious-variant identification, transfer learning across diverged plant species (e.g. Arabidopsis->maize)

name: FloraBERT
description: RoBERTa-based plant DNA language model (47M params) pretrained on ~11.7M plant promoter sequences and fine-tuned to predict tissue-specific maize gene expression across species.
io: Plant promoter DNA sequence -> embeddings; predicted tissue-specific gene expression (TPM, 8 maize tissues)
use_cases: Cross-species gene-expression prediction from promoters, promoter representation learning, crop transfer learning

name: SpeciesLM (species-aware DNA language model)
description: Species-aware masked DNA language model from the Gagneur lab trained on 800+ species spanning ~500M years to capture regulatory elements and their evolution alignment-free.
io: DNA sequence + species token -> masked-nucleotide reconstruction, embeddings/representations
use_cases: Regulatory element/motif discovery, TF/RBP motif detection, evolutionary conservation modeling, representation learning

name: gLM (genomic language model)
description: Transformer (19-layer) trained on ~7M metagenomic scaffolds over ESM-2 protein embeddings to learn genomic context, operon/co-regulation structure and contextualized gene function.
io: Contig of 15-30 genes (as ESM-2 protein embeddings) -> contextualized gene embeddings; masked-gene predictions
use_cases: Protein function/co-regulation prediction, operon detection, MAG binning/assembly correction, genomic-context transfer learning

name: OmniNA
description: Generative (decoder, Llama-based) foundation model jointly trained on 91.7M NCBI nucleotide sequences and their natural-language annotations to unify sequence understanding with text; 66M-1.7B params.
io: Nucleotide sequence (+/- text prompt) -> generated annotations/text, task predictions, embeddings
use_cases: Sequence annotation, functional element recognition, species classification, sequence-to-text tasks, multi-task nucleotide analysis

name: Orca
description: Sequence-based deep-learning model (Zhou lab) predicting multiscale 3D genome organization (TADs, A/B compartments, polycomb interactions, enhancer-promoter contacts) from kilobase to whole-chromosome scale.
io: DNA sequence (up to whole-chromosome) -> predicted Hi-C/Micro-C 3D contact maps; structural-variant effects
use_cases: 3D genome structure prediction, structural-variant effect modeling, in silico virtual genetic screens, TAD/compartment analysis

name: GET (General Expression Transformer)
description: Interpretable foundation model of transcriptional regulation across 213 human fetal/adult cell types that predicts gene expression from chromatin accessibility (peak x TF-motif) and sequence.
io: Cell-type accessibility (peak x TF-motif matrix) + sequence -> predicted gene expression, regulatory syntax, TF interactions
use_cases: Cross-cell-type expression prediction (incl. unseen cell types), regulatory grammar discovery, TF interaction inference, in silico perturbation

name: Decima
description: Genentech sequence model predicting cell-type- and condition-specific gene expression from genomic sequence, trained on pseudobulked single-cell RNA-seq from 22M+ cells; built on the gReLU framework.
io: Genomic sequence around a gene -> predicted cell-type/condition-specific expression; regulatory element attributions
use_cases: Single-cell-resolution expression prediction (including unseen genes), regulatory-element discovery, disease/tissue-state expression change analysis

name: scooby
description: Single-cell-resolution sequence model (Gagneur lab) that fine-tunes Borzoi with a cell-specific decoder to predict scRNA-seq and scATAC-seq genomic profiles directly from DNA.
io: DNA sequence + cell representation -> predicted single-cell multi-omic coverage (scRNA-seq + scATAC-seq) profiles
use_cases: Single-cell multi-omic profile prediction from sequence, cell-state-specific regulatory variant effects, accessibility/expression modeling

name: SegmentNT
description: InstaDeep segmentation model built on the Nucleotide Transformer encoder + 1D U-Net that predicts the location of 14 classes of genomic elements at single-nucleotide resolution over up to 30 kb (generalizes to 50 kb).
io: DNA sequence up to 30 kb -> per-nucleotide segmentation across 14 element classes (genes, UTRs, exons/introns, splice sites, promoters, enhancers, CTCF, polyA)
use_cases: Single-nucleotide genome annotation, regulatory/gene-structure element localization, downstream regulatory genomics

name: HybriDNA
description: Microsoft decoder-only hybrid Transformer-Mamba2 DNA foundation model handling up to 131 kb at single-nucleotide resolution for both understanding and generation; SOTA on 33 DNA-understanding datasets.
io: DNA sequence up to 131 kb -> embeddings/likelihoods (understanding) and generated DNA (generation)
use_cases: Long-range DNA understanding (BEND/GUE/LRB tasks), regulatory element generation, variant/expression tasks

name: JanusDNA
description: Bidirectional hybrid DNA foundation model using a Mamba-Attention Mixture-of-Experts design that combines autoregressive training efficiency with masked-model bidirectional understanding; processes up to 1 Mb on a single 80GB GPU.
io: DNA sequence up to ~1 Mb (single 80GB GPU) -> embeddings/representations; fine-tuned task outputs
use_cases: Long-range genomic representation learning, regulatory benchmarks (Genomic Benchmarks/NT/DNALongBench tasks), bidirectional promoter modeling

name: Orthrus
description: Mamba-based mature-RNA foundation model pretrained by self-supervised contrastive learning over splice isoforms (10 organisms) and orthologous transcripts (400+ mammals, Zoonomia) to learn function/evolution-aware RNA representations. Two sizes: ~1M and ~10M params.
io: Mature RNA/mRNA transcript sequence -> dense embeddings (and fine-tuned property predictions)
status: Open code + weights (MIT; 4-track base and 6-track large checkpoints, HF mirrors exist)
use_cases: mRNA property prediction (half-life, translation, expression), isoform function discrimination, sample-efficient transfer learning

name: UTR-LM
description: Semi-supervised 5' UTR language model pretrained on endogenous and random 5' UTRs across species, augmented with secondary-structure and minimum-free-energy supervision to decode untranslated-region function.
io: 5' UTR RNA sequence -> embeddings and predictions of mean ribosome loading (MRL), translation efficiency (TE), mRNA expression level (EL), IRES
status: Open code + weights (GPL-3.0; checkpoints on Google Drive/CodeOcean/Zenodo)
use_cases: mRNA/UTR therapeutic design, MRL/TE/expression prediction, IRES detection, wet-lab-validated 5' UTR optimization (211-UTR library)

name: CodonBERT
description: BERT-style mRNA language model that tokenizes coding sequences by codons, pretrained on >10M mRNA sequences from diverse organisms for mRNA design and optimization (Sanofi).
io: mRNA coding sequence (codon tokens) -> contextual codon embeddings (and downstream regression/prediction heads)
status: Open code + weights (dual license: separate code and model-artifact licenses; PyTorch weights via download)
use_cases: mRNA vaccine/therapeutic codon optimization, protein expression prediction, mRNA stability/degradation prediction

name: RNAErnie
description: Motif-aware RNA language model (ERNIE-based) that adds RNA-motif-level random masking and RNA-type stop-word tokens during pretraining, plus type-guided fine-tuning for multi-purpose RNA modeling.
io: RNA sequence -> embeddings/attention maps and task predictions (classification, interaction, structure)
status: Open code + weights (Google Drive + HF mirrors: multimolecule/rnaernie, WANGNingroci/RNAErnie)
use_cases: ncRNA classification, RNA-RNA/RNA-protein interaction prediction, secondary structure prediction, general RNA representation

name: BiRNA-BERT
description: 117M-parameter ncRNA transformer encoder trained on ~36M ncRNA sequences with adaptive dual tokenization (nucleotide-level NUC plus byte-pair encoding BPE) selected by input length, using ALiBi for context extension.
io: RNA sequence (NUC or BPE tokens, length-adaptive) -> embeddings and task predictions
use_cases: Short-sequence RNA classification, long-context RNA modeling, fine-grained nucleotide-level structural prediction

name: Helix-mRNA
description: Hybrid Mamba2 state-space + transformer-attention foundation model for full-length mRNA therapeutics, single-nucleotide tokenization with codon separators; effective context ~12,288 tokens at ~10% of comparable transformer params.
io: Full-length mRNA sequence (5'UTR + CDS + 3'UTR) -> embeddings and fine-tuned property predictions
status: Open code, gated weights (HF helical-ai/helix-mRNA, CC-BY-NC-SA, login + non-commercial terms)
use_cases: mRNA therapeutic/vaccine optimization, translation efficiency/stability/degradation analysis across coding and untranslated regions

name: RhoFold+
description: RNA language-model-based deep learning method for single-chain RNA 3D structure prediction, integrating the pretrained RNA-FM language model (trained on ~23.7M RNAs) with MSA and structure modules; end-to-end, fast (~0.14s without MSA search).
io: RNA sequence (FASTA, optional A3M MSA) -> 3D tertiary structure (PDB + pLDDT), secondary structure, distograms
status: Open code + weights (Apache-2.0; checkpoint auto-download / cuhkaih/rhofold on HF; public server)
use_cases: RNA 3D structure prediction, secondary structure inference, structure-based RNA analysis; competitive with top CASP15/RNA-Puzzles methods

name: RNAGenesis
description: ~1B-parameter generalist RNA foundation model unifying sequence representation (BERT-style encoder), de novo functional design (query-based latent compression + diffusion-guided decoder), and 3D structure prediction in one framework.
io: RNA sequence and/or structural/functional constraints -> embeddings, generated/optimized RNA sequences, predicted 3D structures
use_cases: Functional RNA therapeutic design (ASO/siRNA/shRNA/circRNA/aptamer/UTR), inverse folding, RNA 3D structure and de novo structure design

name: LAMAR
description: 12-layer transformer foundation language model for multilayer RNA regulation, pretrained on ~15M genome/transcriptome sequences from 225 mammals and 1569 viruses via masked language modeling.
io: RNA/pre-mRNA sequence -> embeddings and task predictions (translation efficiency, half-life, splice sites, IRES)
use_cases: mRNA translation efficiency and half-life prediction, pre-mRNA splice-site prediction, IRES prediction, RNA regulatory modeling

name: OmniGenome
description: RNA foundation model introducing sequence-structure alignment, enabling bidirectional mapping between RNA sequences and secondary structures (52M and 186M variants).
io: RNA sequence and/or secondary structure -> embeddings, predicted structure, or designed sequences for a target structure
status: Open code + weights (HF: yangheng/OmniGenome-186M and yangheng/OmniGenome-52M; ships with OmniGenBench)
use_cases: RNA secondary structure prediction, RNA design for target structures (74% EternaV2 solved vs up to 3% prior), TF binding prediction, genomic FM benchmarking

name: mRNABERT
description: Universal 86M-parameter mRNA language model pretrained on >18M non-redundant mRNAs with dual tokenization (single-nucleotide for UTRs, codons for CDS) and cross-modality contrastive learning against frozen ProtT5-XL protein embeddings.
io: mRNA sequence -> embeddings and predictions/designs for 5' UTR, CDS, and RBP sites
use_cases: End-to-end mRNA sequence design (5' UTR and CDS), RNA-binding-protein site prediction, full-length mRNA property/optimization (R2=0.66 on TE)

name: trRosettaRNA
description: Automated RNA 3D structure prediction that feeds MSA and predicted secondary structure into a transformer (RNAformer) to predict inter-nucleotide 1D/2D geometries, then folds 3D models by energy minimization.
io: RNA sequence (+ auto-generated MSA and secondary structure) -> predicted 2D geometries and 3D tertiary structure
status: Open code + weights (Apache-2.0; params downloadable from Yang Lab server; public web server)
use_cases: De novo RNA 3D structure prediction; CASP15/RNA-Puzzles-competitive automated predictions

name: DRfold
description: End-to-end deep-learning RNA tertiary-structure predictor combining learned local frame rotations and geometric restraints (MSA-free); DRfold2 (2026) adds a pretrained RNA Composite Language Model (RCLM) and a denoising structure module for end-to-end ab initio folding.
io: RNA sequence (+ secondary structure) -> predicted 3D tertiary structure (atomic resolution)
use_cases: Ab initio / single-sequence RNA 3D structure prediction without MSA

name: RoseTTAFoldNA
description: Single three-track network extending RoseTTAFold2 to predict 3D structures of nucleic acids and protein-DNA/protein-RNA complexes with per-prediction confidence estimates.
io: Protein and/or nucleic-acid (RNA/DNA) sequences -> 3D structure of the complex with confidence
status: Open code + weights (weights downloadable via repo)
use_cases: Protein-RNA and protein-DNA complex modeling, RNA monomer/dimer structure, design of sequence-specific nucleic-acid-binding proteins

name: SaProt
description: Structure-aware protein language model that augments amino acids with Foldseek 3Di structure tokens to form a combined sequence-structure (SA) vocabulary; trained on ~40M sequence-structure pairs.
io: Amino acid sequence + Foldseek 3Di structure tokens -> residue/sequence embeddings, masked-token logits, zero-shot variant scores
use_cases: Zero-shot variant effect / fitness prediction (top ProteinGym performer), structure-aware embeddings, function/localization prediction, cross-modal search

name: ProstT5
description: Bilingual T5 protein language model (fine-tuned from ProtT5-XL-U50 on 17M AlphaFoldDB structures) that translates bidirectionally between amino acid sequence and Foldseek 3Di structure tokens (folding and inverse folding).
io: Amino acid sequence <-> 3Di structure token string; encoder also yields embeddings
use_cases: Fast structure-aware remote homology detection, sequence-to-3Di prediction for structureless Foldseek search, structure-conditioned sequence design, embeddings

name: ProSST
description: Structure-aware protein language model combining GVP-based quantized local-structure tokens (18.8M structures) with a sequence-structure disentangled-attention transformer.
io: Protein sequence + quantized local-structure tokens -> embeddings, masked-token logits, zero-shot mutation scores
use_cases: State-of-the-art zero-shot mutation effect prediction on ProteinGym (~0.504 Spearman), supervised tasks (thermostability, metal-ion binding, localization), structure-aware representation learning

name: AMPLIFY
description: Efficient ESM-style masked protein language model (120M/350M) from Amgen/Mila/Chandar-lab built to match much larger PLMs at far lower cost by prioritizing data quality over scale.
io: Amino acid sequence -> residue/sequence embeddings, masked-token logits
use_cases: General protein embeddings, fine-tuning for property/function prediction, zero-shot variant scoring, low-cost replacement for large PLMs

name: CARP
description: Convolutional (ByteNet/CNN) masked protein language model family from Microsoft Research (CARP-640M) showing convolutions are competitive with transformers for protein pretraining; scales linearly with sequence length.
io: Amino acid sequence -> residue/sequence embeddings, masked-token logits
use_cases: Sequence embeddings, structure/function transfer, zero-shot mutation effect prediction, long-sequence modeling without quadratic attention cost; basis for EvoDiff

name: LigandMPNN
description: Inverse-folding sequence design model extending ProteinMPNN to explicitly condition on non-protein atomic context (small molecules, nucleotides, metals); also outputs side-chain conformations.
io: Protein backbone + ligand/nucleotide/metal atomic context (PDB) -> designed sequences and side-chain conformations
use_cases: Sequence design for ligand/DNA/metal-binding sites, enzyme and binder design, redesign of interfaces involving non-protein atoms

name: AntiFold
description: Antibody-specific inverse-folding model fine-tuned from ESM-IF1 on solved and predicted antibody structures (Deane lab / OPIG).
io: Antibody backbone structure -> CDR-aware designed sequences and per-residue probabilities
use_cases: Antibody CDR sequence design, zero-shot antibody-antigen binding affinity ranking, structure-based antibody optimization

name: RFdiffusion2
description: Next-generation RoseTTAFold-All-Atom-based diffusion/flow-matching model for de novo enzyme/protein design directly from atom-level functional-group constraints without specifying residue order.
io: Atomic motif / functional-group geometry constraints -> protein backbone scaffolds
use_cases: Enzyme active-site scaffolding, atom-level (unindexed) motif scaffolding, small-molecule-aware de novo design

name: Genie 2
description: SE(3)-equivariant DDPM protein-structure diffusion model for unconditional C-alpha backbone generation and single- and multi-motif scaffolding, trained with large AlphaFold-DB augmentation.
io: Length / motif constraints -> generated protein backbones (C-alpha frames)
use_cases: Unconditional protein backbone generation, single- and multi-motif scaffolding for functional-site design, diversity/novelty-focused design

name: FrameDiff / FrameFlow / Multiflow
description: Family of SE(3) frame-based generative models for protein backbones: FrameDiff (diffusion), FrameFlow (flow matching, ~5x fewer steps), and Multiflow (joint sequence-structure co-design over discrete + continuous state spaces via Discrete Flow Models).
io: Noise / length (+ optional motif) -> generated backbone frames; Multiflow -> joint backbone + sequence
use_cases: De novo backbone generation, fast flow-matching sampling, protein sequence-structure co-design, motif scaffolding

name: Proteus
description: Graph-triangle-based protein backbone diffusion model achieving high designability and efficiency without RoseTTAFold/AlphaFold structure-prediction pretraining.
io: Length / noise -> generated protein backbones
use_cases: Efficient de novo backbone generation, designable monomer scaffold generation

name: EvoDiff
description: Microsoft discrete-diffusion framework for controllable protein generation in sequence space, with sequence (EvoDiff-Seq, 38M/640M) and MSA (EvoDiff-MSA) models; built on CARP/ByteNet.
io: Noise / partial sequence / MSA / motif constraints -> generated or inpainted protein sequences
use_cases: Unconditional and conditional sequence generation, motif scaffolding/inpainting in sequence space, generation of disordered regions inaccessible to structure-based models

name: DPLM-2
description: Multimodal extension of the diffusion protein language model (DPLM) that jointly models sequence and structure via lookup-free-quantized structure tokens, enabling single-stage co-generation.
io: Sequence and/or structure-token prompts/masks -> jointly generated sequence + 3D structure (folding, inverse folding, co-design)
use_cases: Simultaneous sequence-structure co-generation, folding, inverse folding, multimodal motif scaffolding, structure-aware representations

name: Pinal (Denovo-Pinal)
description: Text-to-protein design framework that generates protein sequences from natural-language descriptions via a structure-then-sequence two-stage 16B-parameter pipeline trained on ~1.7B protein-text pairs.
io: Natural-language prompt (keywords/phrases/paragraph) -> designed protein sequence(s)
use_cases: Language-guided de novo protein design, function-conditioned generation, accessible 'prompt a protein' workflows

name: AIDO.Protein-16B
description: First mixture-of-experts protein language model (16B params, 8 experts/2 active, ~4.5B active) in GenBio's AIDO multiscale foundation-model system, pretrained on 1.2T amino acids (UniRef90 + ColabFoldDB).
io: Amino acid sequence -> embeddings, masked-token logits, zero-shot variant scores, generated sequence
use_cases: Protein understanding (xTrimoPGLM benchmark SOTA), zero-shot DMS/ProteinGym fitness prediction, structure-conditioned sequence generation, downstream adaptation via ModelGenerator

name: PTM-Mamba
description: PTM-aware protein language model using bidirectional gated Mamba blocks fused with ESM-2 embeddings to represent post-translationally modified residues.
io: Amino acid sequence + PTM tokens -> PTM-aware residue embeddings, task predictions
use_cases: PTM effect prediction on protein-protein interactions, disease-association and druggability prediction, zero-shot PTM discovery

name: ProtHyena
description: Hyena-operator protein language model (~1.6M params) giving sub-quadratic single-amino-acid-resolution modeling of long sequences; protein analog of HyenaDNA, trained on Pfam.
io: Amino acid sequence -> embeddings, next-token predictions, task heads
use_cases: Long-sequence protein modeling, fluorescence/stability/secondary-structure prediction, efficient embeddings

name: LC-PLM
description: Long-context protein language model based on a bidirectional Mamba (BiMamba-S, shared projection layers) architecture from Amazon Science for efficient very-long-sequence modeling; graph-contextual variant LC-PLM-G.
io: Amino acid sequence (long context) -> residue/sequence embeddings, masked-token logits
use_cases: Long protein / multi-domain modeling, length extrapolation, embeddings for structure and function tasks, PPI-graph-contextual protein modeling

name: AntiBERTy
description: Antibody-specific BERT masked language model (26M params) pretrained on 558M natural antibody heavy and light chains; the representation model underlying IgFold (Gray lab, Johns Hopkins).
io: Antibody sequence -> residue embeddings, attention, pseudo-log-likelihoods
use_cases: Antibody embeddings, affinity-maturation trajectory analysis, clustering, input features for structure prediction (IgFold)

name: AbLang2 / TCRLang
description: Second-generation antibody language model trained on paired and unpaired OAS data, focused on suggesting diverse non-germline residues and correcting germline bias; includes a paired TCR-weights variant (TCRLang).
io: Paired/unpaired antibody (or TCR) sequence with masks/gaps -> restored residues, embeddings, mutation suggestions
use_cases: Antibody sequence restoration, germline-bias-corrected mutation suggestion, paired-chain antibody and TCR representation, antibody design

name: IgBert / IgT5
description: Large-scale antibody-specific BERT and T5 language models (Exscientia/Oxford) trained on 2B+ unpaired and 2M+ paired OAS sequences, handling paired and unpaired variable regions.
io: Paired or unpaired antibody heavy/light sequences -> embeddings, masked-token logits (IgT5 is a T5/encoder-decoder; IgBert is encoder)
use_cases: Antibody engineering regression/design tasks, developability and binding-related prediction, paired-chain antibody embeddings

name: p-IgGen
description: Generative paired antibody language model (GPT-2-like decoder, OPIG/AstraZeneca) that produces full paired heavy-light antibody sequences, with a developability-biased fine-tuned variant.
io: Optional seed/one chain -> generated paired antibody sequences (or complementary chain); also scores sequences
use_cases: De novo paired antibody generation, chain pairing/completion, developability-aware therapeutic antibody design

name: BALM (Bio-inspired Antibody Language Model)
description: Antibody language model (BEAM-Labs) trained on ~336M nonredundant antibody sequences for antibody function/structure prediction; basis for the BALMFold structure predictor.
io: Antibody sequence -> embeddings, task predictions; BALMFold -> antibody structure
use_cases: Antigen-binding prediction, paratope prediction, binding-affinity prediction, maturation-trajectory modeling, antibody structure prediction (BALMFold)

name: Sapiens
description: Human antibody BERT masked language models (separate heavy/light) from Merck's BioPhi platform, trained on OAS for in-silico antibody humanization.
io: Antibody variable-region sequence -> per-position human residue probabilities / humanized sequence, embeddings
use_cases: Automated antibody humanization, humanness evaluation (within BioPhi/OASis), antibody sequence repair

name: ProteinNPT
description: Non-parametric transformer (Marks/OATML lab) that jointly attends over batches of protein sequences and their property labels (plus PLM/MSA embeddings) for semi-supervised fitness prediction and design.
io: Sequence batch + (partial) property labels + PLM/MSA embeddings -> predicted properties, conditionally sampled sequences
use_cases: Single/multi-property fitness prediction, conditional sequence generation, iterative protein redesign via Bayesian optimization

name: PoET-2
description: Retrieval-augmented multimodal protein foundation model (OpenProtein.AI, ~182M params) accepting sequence and structural context with dual causal + masked decoders; in-context family-evolutionary conditioning.
io: Conditioning set of homologs/structures + sequence context -> zero/few-shot fitness scores, generated sequences, embeddings
use_cases: Zero- and few-shot fitness/stability/binding prediction, conditional protein generation, in-context protein engineering with minimal data

name: Protriever
description: End-to-end differentiable retrieval-augmented protein language model (Marks/OATML) that jointly learns homology search and fitness prediction via efficient vector search.
io: Query sequence + learned-retrieved homologs (e.g. UniRef) -> autoregressive fitness/variant scores, embeddings
use_cases: MSA-free / fast homology-aware fitness prediction, variant effect prediction, retrieval-augmented protein modeling

name: ZymCTRL
description: Conditional autoregressive protein language model (~738M params, Ferruz lab / Basecamp Research) that generates artificial enzyme sequences for a user-specified Enzyme Commission (EC) number.
io: EC number (+ optional sequence context) -> generated enzyme sequences
use_cases: Function-conditioned enzyme design, de novo enzyme generation for a target reaction, controllable family-specific generation

name: ProtGPS
description: ESM-2-based model (MIT/Whitehead) predicting protein subcellular compartment/condensate localization (12 classes) and generating sequences targeted to a chosen compartment.
io: Protein sequence -> predicted compartment / mutation effect on localization; or compartment target -> generated sequence
use_cases: Subcellular/condensate localization prediction, disease-mutation localization-shift analysis, generative design of compartment-targeted proteins

name: AlphaFold2
description: MSA- and template-based deep learning model that predicts highly accurate single-chain protein 3D structures; the breakthrough CASP14 system and foundation for most downstream structure workflows and the AlphaFold DB.
io: Protein sequence + MSA/templates -> 3D protein structure + per-residue confidence (pLDDT/PAE)
use_cases: Monomer structure prediction, structural annotation, input to docking/design pipelines, source of structural embeddings

name: AlphaFold-Multimer
description: Extension of AlphaFold2 trained specifically on multimeric inputs to predict multi-chain protein complex (protein-protein assembly) structures; the standard pre-AlphaFold3 complex-prediction method.
io: Multi-chain protein FASTA + paired/unpaired MSAs -> protein complex 3D structure with interface confidence (ipTM/pTM)
use_cases: Protein-protein complex prediction, interface/epitope modeling, PPI screening, assembly hypotheses

name: Protenix
description: ByteDance's trainable, fully open-source PyTorch reproduction of AlphaFold3 for all-atom biomolecular complex structure prediction; the v1 release (2026) added protein-template integration and RNA MSA support to match or exceed AF3 on several benchmarks, and v2 (2026) adds large antibody-antigen gains, GPCR hit discovery, and zero-shot antibody design.
io: JSON spec of protein/RNA/DNA/ligand (+optional MSA, templates, atom-level constraints) -> all-atom complex 3D structure
use_cases: Open AF3-style complex prediction, antibody-antigen modeling, drug-target structures, retraining/fine-tuning research

name: HelixFold3
description: Baidu PaddleHelix's AlphaFold3 reproduction for all-atom biomolecular complex structure prediction across proteins, nucleic acids, ligands, ions and modifications; one of the first public AF3 reproductions (Aug 2024).
io: Protein/nucleic-acid/ligand specification -> all-atom complex 3D structure
use_cases: AF3-style complex prediction, ligand and nucleic-acid complexes, antibody-antigen (HelixFold-Multimer variant), drug discovery

name: OpenFold3
description: OpenFold consortium / AlQuraishi Lab fully open AlphaFold3 reproduction (OpenFold3-preview) for protein/RNA/DNA/small-molecule complex prediction, released with open weights, training code, and public training data under Apache 2.0.
io: Protein/RNA/DNA/small-molecule inputs -> all-atom biomolecular complex 3D structure
use_cases: Reproducible AF3-class complex prediction, benchmarking, retraining/fine-tuning, commercial structure prediction (Apache 2.0)

name: Chai-2
description: Chai Discovery's all-atom multimodal generative foundation model for zero-shot de novo antibody/nanobody and miniprotein binder design at atomic precision; successor to Chai-1.
io: Target epitope/structure -> de novo antibody/nanobody/binder sequences and designed complex structures
use_cases: De novo antibody/nanobody design, binder generation against novel epitopes, therapeutic discovery without high-throughput screening

name: NeuralPLexer (and NeuralPLexer3)
description: Multiscale deep generative model for protein-ligand complex structure prediction and ligand-induced conformational states from protein sequence + ligand graph (diffusion in v1; NeuralPLexer3 uses flow matching for physio-realistic biomolecular complexes).
io: Protein sequence + ligand molecular graph (+optional templates) -> protein-ligand complex 3D structure / conformational ensemble
use_cases: Co-folding / blind docking, structure-based drug design, modeling ligand-induced conformational change

name: Umol
description: Sequence-based deep learning model that predicts fully flexible all-atom protein-ligand complex structures without requiring a known protein structure (protein as MSA, ligand as SMILES).
io: Protein sequence (MSA) + ligand SMILES + optional binding-site info -> protein-ligand complex 3D structure + confidence (plDDT)
use_cases: Protein-ligand co-folding from sequence, binder vs non-binder discrimination via confidence, structure-based virtual screening

name: DiffDock-L
description: Generalizing version of the DiffDock diffusion docking model using confidence-bootstrapping self-training for much better cross-pocket generalization (DockGen success 10%->24%).
io: Protein structure + ligand -> ranked ligand binding poses
use_cases: Blind molecular docking, pose generation, docking generalization to novel protein domains (DockGen benchmark)

name: Uni-Mol Docking V2
description: Upgraded Uni-Mol-based protein-ligand docking model producing chemically realistic, high-accuracy binding poses (>77% of PoseBusters under 2A RMSD, avoiding chirality/steric-clash artifacts).
io: Protein pocket + ligand -> binding pose 3D coordinates
use_cases: Accurate binding-pose prediction, structure-based virtual screening, lead optimization

name: FlowDock
description: Geometric flow-matching generative model for simultaneous protein-ligand docking (apo-to-holo) and binding-affinity prediction.
io: Protein sequence(s) + ligand SMILES -> protein-ligand complex structure + predicted binding affinity
use_cases: Apo-state blind docking, generative co-folding, affinity estimation for virtual screening

name: IgFold
description: Fast, accurate antibody/nanobody structure prediction model that leverages embeddings from the AntiBERTy antibody language model to directly predict backbone coordinates in seconds.
io: Antibody/nanobody sequence(s) -> 3D antibody structure (+ refinement)
use_cases: High-throughput antibody structure prediction, repertoire-scale modeling (OAS-scale databases), antibody engineering pipelines

name: ABodyBuilder3
description: Scalable antibody structure prediction model leveraging ProtT5 language-model embeddings with improved CDR-loop accuracy and per-residue pLDDT-style uncertainty (successor to ABodyBuilder2).
io: Antibody heavy/light chain sequences -> 3D antibody structure + predicted per-residue confidence (pLDDT)
use_cases: Antibody structure prediction, developability/engineering workflows, large-scale antibody modeling

name: RoseTTAFold2
description: Updated full three-track RoseTTAFold network for protein monomer and complex structure prediction, matching AF2 (monomer) and AF2-Multimer (complex) accuracy with better scaling on large proteins/complexes.
io: Protein sequence(s) + MSA -> monomer or complex 3D structure
use_cases: Protein and complex structure prediction, backbone scaffold for downstream design tools (e.g. RFdiffusion), large-protein modeling

name: OmegaFold
description: MSA-free protein structure predictor that folds from a single primary sequence using the OmegaPLM protein language model plus a geometry-aware Geoformer.
io: Single protein sequence -> 3D protein structure
use_cases: Structure prediction for orphan proteins and antibodies (noisy/absent MSAs), fast single-sequence / metagenomic structure annotation

name: Chemformer / MolBART
description: BART-style encoder-decoder transformer pretrained on SMILES with a denoising/heteroencoding objective, fine-tunable for both sequence-to-sequence and discriminative cheminformatics tasks.
io: SMILES (optionally corrupted) -> embeddings or generated/transformed SMILES
use_cases: Reaction prediction, retrosynthesis, molecular optimization, property prediction, SMILES generation

name: MolGPT
description: GPT/transformer-decoder language model trained with next-token prediction over SMILES for conditional and unconditional drug-like molecule generation.
io: Optional property/scaffold conditioning + SMILES context -> generated SMILES
use_cases: De novo molecule generation, property/scaffold-conditioned generation, generative-model benchmarking

name: SAFE-GPT
description: 87M-parameter GPT-2-style model trained on ~1.1B molecules encoded in the SAFE (Sequential Attachment-based Fragment Embedding) line notation, enabling fragment-constrained generation in one autoregressive framework.
io: SAFE/SMILES fragment or scaffold context -> generated molecules (SAFE/SMILES)
use_cases: Scaffold decoration, fragment linking, scaffold hopping, motif extension, de novo generation

name: GenMol
description: Generalist masked discrete-diffusion model over SAFE molecular sequences using non-autoregressive parallel decoding, fragment remasking, and molecular context guidance for unified drug-discovery generation.
io: Molecular/fragment context (SAFE) -> generated valid molecules
use_cases: De novo generation, fragment-constrained design, goal-directed hit generation, lead optimization

name: Megalodon
description: Scalable transformer with lightweight equivariant layers for de novo 3D molecule generation, trained with a joint continuous-and-discrete denoising (diffusion / flow-matching) co-design objective.
io: Optional conditioning -> 3D molecular structures (atoms + coordinates)
use_cases: Unconditional/conditional 3D molecule generation, low-energy structure generation, structure-energy benchmarks

name: Uni-Mol2
description: Two-track (atom/graph/geometry) 3D molecular pretraining model scaled from 84M to 1.1B parameters on 800M conformations, the largest molecular pretraining model in the Uni-Mol series and a scaling-law study.
io: Molecular graph + 3D conformer -> embeddings / property predictions
use_cases: Molecular property prediction (e.g., QM9, COMPAS), 3D-aware representation learning, transfer learning

name: MolCLR
description: Self-supervised graph-contrastive learning framework that pretrains GNN (GCN/GIN) encoders on ~10M molecules via atom-masking, bond-deletion, and subgraph-removal augmentations.
io: Molecular graph -> embeddings / fine-tuned property predictions
use_cases: Molecular property prediction, transferable graph representations, contrastive-pretraining baseline

name: Mole-BERT
description: Graph pretraining framework with a VQ-VAE context-aware atom tokenizer plus Masked Atoms Modeling and Triplet Masked Contrastive Learning to fix mismatches in masked-atom GNN pretraining.
io: Molecular graph -> embeddings / fine-tuned predictions
use_cases: Molecular property prediction, self-supervised graph representation learning

name: KPGT (Knowledge-Guided Pre-training of Graph Transformer)
description: Line Graph Transformer (LiGhT) emphasizing chemical bonds, pretrained on ~2M molecules with a knowledge-guided strategy using molecular descriptors/fingerprints as additional supervision.
io: Molecular graph -> embeddings / property predictions
use_cases: Molecular property prediction (evaluated on 63 datasets), knowledge-guided representation learning

name: MolGen
description: Pretrained BART-style molecular language model over 100M+ SELFIES with domain-agnostic prefix tuning and a chemical-feedback paradigm to avoid invalid 'molecular hallucinations'.
io: SELFIES context / property targets -> generated valid molecules
use_cases: De novo and property-targeted molecular generation, multi-task molecular design

name: MolBERT
description: BERT-style SMILES language model from BenevolentAI pretrained with masked language modeling plus chemistry-relevant auxiliary tasks (physicochemical property regression on 200 RDKit descriptors, SMILES equivalence).
io: SMILES -> molecular embeddings / property predictions
use_cases: Virtual screening, QSAR/property prediction, molecular similarity, transfer learning

name: SMI-TED (materials.smi-ted)
description: Large encoder-decoder ('SMILES Transformer Encoder-Decoder') chemical foundation model pretrained on 91M PubChem SMILES (~4B tokens), released in 289M and 8x289M (mixture-of-experts) variants.
io: SMILES -> embeddings or reconstructed/generated SMILES
use_cases: Quantum-property prediction, reaction-yield prediction, classification/regression, few-shot molecular tasks

name: SMI-SSED (materials.smi_ssed)
description: Mamba-based (state-space) encoder-decoder chemical foundation model pretrained on 91M PubChem SMILES (~4B tokens), released in 336M and 8x336M variants.
io: SMILES -> embeddings or reconstructed/generated SMILES
use_cases: Quantum-property prediction, molecular reconstruction, classification/regression, synthesis-yield prediction

name: ChemFM
description: Scaling-law-guided causal decoder-only (TinyLlama-style) chemical language model (1B and 3B parameters) pretrained via self-supervised causal LM on 178M UniChem molecules (~1.78B augmented SMILES).
io: SMILES -> embeddings / property predictions / generated SMILES
use_cases: Molecular property prediction (34+ benchmarks), molecular design/generation, conditional generation

name: MIST
description: Family of encoder-only SMILES transformer foundation models (MIST-28M to MIST-1.8B) pretrained with masked language modeling on up to ~2B Enamine REAL Space molecules using the Smirk tokenizer.
io: SMILES -> embeddings / fine-tuned property predictions
use_cases: Molecular and formulation property prediction across 400+ tasks, large-scale chemical-space exploration

name: SMILES-BERT
description: Early transformer encoder pretrained on large unlabeled SMILES via a masked SMILES-recovery objective, then fine-tuned for molecular property prediction.
io: SMILES tokens -> embeddings / property predictions
use_cases: Molecular property prediction, transfer learning from unlabeled chemical data

name: CDDD (Continuous and Data-Driven molecular Descriptors)
description: Translation (seq2seq autoencoder) model mapping between equivalent SMILES to learn a fixed-size continuous latent representation usable as molecular descriptors and for generation.
io: SMILES -> continuous latent descriptor vector (and back to SMILES via decoder)
use_cases: Descriptor extraction for QSAR/property prediction, latent-space molecular optimization/generation

name: STATE (Arc Institute)
description: Arc Institute's first virtual-cell model: a perturbation-trained pair of modules (State Embedding SE + State Transition ST) that predicts single-cell transcriptional responses to genetic, chemical, and cytokine perturbations.
io: Cell expression context + perturbation specification -> predicted post-perturbation expression / cell embeddings
status: Open code + weights (non-commercial; Arc Research Institute State Model license + acceptable-use policy; SE-600M weights downloadable)
use_cases: In silico perturbation screening, drug/cytokine response prediction, perturbation effect ranking, virtual-cell modeling

name: Tahoe-x1
description: Family of perturbation-trained single-cell foundation models (Tx1-70M, Tx1-1B, Tx1-3B) from Tahoe/Vevo Therapeutics, pretrained on large single-cell corpora including the Tahoe-100M drug-perturbation compendium.
io: scRNA-seq expression profile -> cell-state embeddings / perturbation-aware predictions
use_cases: Cancer-relevant cell-state representation, drug perturbation modeling, target/biomarker discovery, gigascale single-cell analysis

name: scLong
description: Billion-parameter single-cell transcriptomics foundation model that runs self-attention across the full ~28,000-gene set (including lowly expressed genes) and injects Gene Ontology knowledge via a graph convolutional network.
io: scRNA-seq expression vector (full gene set) -> gene/cell embeddings, task predictions
use_cases: Genetic/chemical perturbation response prediction, cancer drug response, gene regulatory network inference, long-range gene-context modeling

name: GeneMamba
description: Single-cell transcriptomics foundation model on a bidirectional Bi-Mamba (state-space) backbone for linear-time gene-context modeling, pretrained on ~30M CELLxGENE cells with pathway-aware contrastive loss and rank-based gene encoding.
io: scRNA-seq expression vector -> cell/gene embeddings, downstream task heads
status: Open code + weights (Hugging Face: mineself2016/GeneMamba; checkpoints ~65M-750M params)
use_cases: Cell type annotation, multi-batch integration, long-transcriptome modeling, gene-gene correlation analysis

name: scTab
description: Feature-attention (TabNet-based) foundation-scale cross-tissue cell-type annotation model trained with a novel augmentation scheme on 22.2M human cells spanning 164 cell types and 56 tissues.
io: scRNA-seq cell expression -> cell-type label (with deep-ensemble uncertainty)
use_cases: Cross-tissue automated cell type annotation, large-scale reference annotation, uncertainty-aware labeling

name: GenePT
description: Embedding model for genes and cells built from GPT-3.5/ChatGPT embeddings of NCBI gene text descriptions, requiring no gene-expression pretraining.
io: Gene names / expression-ordered gene lists -> LLM-derived gene and cell embeddings
use_cases: Cell type classification, gene-property prediction, perturbation embedding (GenePert), lightweight single-cell representation

name: scELMo
description: Framework turning LLM text embeddings of gene/metadata descriptions into reusable single-cell representations usable zero-shot or fine-tuned, without large-scale expression pretraining.
io: Gene/metadata descriptions + expression data -> LLM-based gene/cell embeddings
use_cases: Cell clustering, batch-effect correction, cell type annotation, in-silico treatment / perturbation modeling

name: LangCell
description: Language-cell pre-training framework aligning scRNA-seq profiles with cell-identity text (scLibrary, 27.5M cell-text pairs) for zero/few-shot cell-identity understanding.
io: scRNA-seq cell profile (+ optional text) -> cell embeddings / zero-shot cell-type and identity predictions
use_cases: Zero-shot and few-shot cell type annotation, novel cell-type identification, cell-text retrieval, batch integration

name: CellWhisperer
description: Multimodal CLIP-style model aligning transcriptomes (via Geneformer) and text (via BioBERT) with contrastive learning, enabling natural-language chat over single-cell data.
io: Transcriptome and/or natural-language query -> shared embedding, text answers, cell/gene retrieval
use_cases: Conversational scRNA-seq exploration, automated cell annotation/description, transcriptome-text retrieval

name: scMMGPT
description: Single-cell multimodal generative pretrained transformer linking a cell PLM and a text PLM via cell-to-text and text-to-cell cross-modal projectors, pretrained on 27M CELLxGENE cells.
io: Cell expression and/or text -> cell description text, generated pseudo-cells, annotations
use_cases: Cell annotation and clustering, text-to-cell generation, cell-to-text description, cross-modal reasoning

name: C2S-Scale (Cell2Sentence-Scale)
description: Scaled Cell2Sentence family (up to 27B params, Gemma-2 based) from Google Research/DeepMind and Yale representing cells as 'cell sentences' of ranked gene names for LLM-native single-cell reasoning.
io: scRNA-seq profile as cell sentence (+ text prompt) -> generated text, predictions, hypotheses, cell sentences
status: Model hub (Hugging Face: C2S-Scale-Gemma-2 2B and 27B; Apache-2.0 code)
use_cases: Cell annotation, multicellular/multimodal reasoning, biological hypothesis generation, drug-response prediction

name: TEDDY
description: Family of single-cell foundation models (70M/160M/400M params) trained on a large annotated corpus via corrupted-expression reconstruction, with two variants (Teddy-G Geneformer-style, Teddy-X scGPT-style), introduced alongside a disease-focused benchmark.
io: scRNA-seq expression (corrupted) -> reconstructed expression / cell embeddings
use_cases: Cell representation learning, disease-state classification, scaling-law studies for cell FMs

name: CellVQ
description: Interpretable 500M-parameter single-cell foundation model with a Single-Cell Discretization (vector-quantization) module that turns sparse expression into discrete 'cell codes', trained on 68M cells; ships CellVQ-Graph for multimodal knowledge graphs.
io: scRNA-seq expression -> discrete cell code / embeddings; CellVQ-Graph builds multimodal knowledge graphs
use_cases: Cell-state identification, interpretable representation learning, multimodal knowledge-graph construction for discovery

name: RegFormer
description: Single-cell foundation model that embeds gene regulatory network hierarchies into a Mamba state-space architecture for biologically grounded, efficient long-sequence modeling.
io: scRNA-seq expression (+ GRN priors) -> cell/gene embeddings, GRNs, task predictions
use_cases: Cell annotation, gene regulatory network construction, genetic perturbation and drug-response prediction

name: scPRINT-2
description: Next-generation cell foundation model from the Cantini lab pretrained on 350M cells across 16 organisms, adding a generative cell-level architecture for imputation and counterfactual reasoning, with a new benchmark suite.
io: scRNA-seq count data -> denoised expression, cell embeddings, cell-type predictions, generated/counterfactual cells
use_cases: Expression denoising, cell embedding/annotation, imputation, counterfactual/generative single-cell modeling, benchmarking

name: scLinguist
description: Pre-trained Hyena-based foundation model for cross-modality translation in single-cell multi-omics (scRNA-seq, single-cell proteomics, etc.), trained with self-supervised unimodal pretraining + paired post-pretraining.
io: Single-cell data in one modality -> translated/predicted profile in another modality + shared embeddings
use_cases: Cross-modality translation, multi-omics integration, missing-modality (e.g., protein-from-RNA) imputation

name: CAPTAIN
description: Multimodal single-cell foundation model jointly pretrained on co-assayed RNA and surface protein (CITE-seq-style) data over ~4M+ cells with 382 standardized surface proteins; initialized from scGPT.
io: Single-cell transcriptome (+ optional protein) -> joint RNA-protein embeddings, imputed proteins, annotations
use_cases: Surface-protein imputation/expansion, cell type annotation, batch harmonization, RNA-protein cross-modal analysis

name: scConcept
description: Contrastive-pretraining single-cell foundation model that learns count- and gene-panel-invariant cell embeddings by contrasting multiple cell views instead of gene-level reconstruction; pretrained on >30M scRNA-seq profiles.
io: scRNA-seq profile / gene-panel subset -> panel-invariant cell embedding
use_cases: Technology-agnostic cell representation, cross-platform integration, dissociated-to-spatial transfer, gene-panel optimization

name: ScDiVa
description: Masked discrete-diffusion single-cell foundation model jointly modeling discrete gene identity and continuous expression magnitude with a bidirectional denoiser and latent anchor token; pretrained on 59M cells.
io: Masked/corrupted single-cell expression -> denoised gene identities + magnitudes, cell embeddings, generated cells
use_cases: Single-cell generation, dropout/sparsity-aware denoising, joint identity-and-expression modeling, representation learning

name: Tabula
description: Tabular self-supervised single-cell foundation model trained with federated learning, using combined gene-wise (column) reconstruction and cell-wise (row) contrastive objectives for privacy-preserving pretraining.
io: scRNA-seq expression (tabular) -> cell/gene embeddings, task predictions
use_cases: Batch correction, cell annotation, multi-omics integration, denoising/imputation, GRN inference, privacy-preserving pretraining

name: PULSAR
